data.title: Bybit CEO says firm secured almost 80% of lost ETH as bridge loan from partners to ease liquidity crunch following $1.4 billion hack
data.description:
Bybit Co-Founder and CEO Ben Zhao said all client withdrawals will be processed, even if they are under review, following the firm's $1.4 billion hack Friday morning.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342739/bybit-secures-80-lost-eth-bridge-loan-partners-liquidity-crunch-following-hack?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: “To be honest right now, everyone is affected,” Bybit’s Jan says
data.description:
Crypto exchange ByBit says everyone is affected by the suspected hack of one of its cold wallets leading to the theft of almost $1.4 billion in Ethereum. During a live stream X platform, ByBit’s head of derivatives and Institutions, Shunyet Jan,  precisely said “to be honest right now, everyone is affected.” JUST IN: Bybit when […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/to-be-honest-right-now-everyone-is-affected-bybits-jan-says/

data.title: SEC Drops Enforcement Lawsuit Against Against Top US Crypto Exchange, ‘Righting a Major Wrong’: Coinbase
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is dropping a lawsuit against the top US-based crypto exchange, according to a new Coinbase blog post. Coinbase says the SEC has agreed “in principle” to dismiss its case with Commissioner approval. According to Coinbase, the suit being dropped should be viewed as a “major win for the […]
The post SEC Drops Enforcement Lawsuit Against Against...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/21/sec-drops-enforcement-lawsuit-against-against-top-us-crypto-exchange-righting-a-major-wrong-coinbase/
